utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all seven of these items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (October 15–19, 2024), transportation (flight details with cost €75), accommodation (hotel details with cost €450), activities (hiking tour with cost €35), additional_services (vegan dining with cost €27.5), and total_budget (total cost €587.5 and remaining budget). All are included with sufficient details and costs as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes five main components: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), transportation (Budget Airlines flight, economy class), accommodation (Eco Lodge hotel), activity (Hiking Expedition), and additional services (Vegan Bistro dining). Using the ground-truth dataset, we match each of these items to their corresponding ratings: Prague, Czech Republic has a rating of 7; Budget Airlines - Economy Class has a rating of 10; Eco Lodge has a rating of 10; Hiking Expedition has a rating of 10; and Vegan Bistro has a rating of 10.
